rules.rule_text:
rule APT1_GDOCUPLOAD
{
	meta:
		author = "AlienVault Labs"
		info = "CommentCrew-threat-apt1"

	strings:
		$str1 = "name=\"GALX\"" wide ascii
		$str2 = "User-Agent: Shockwave Flash" wide ascii
		$str3 = "add cookie failed..." wide ascii
		$str4 = ",speed=%f" wide ascii

	condition:
		3 of them
}
